user_level: beginner — needs click-by-click guides, zero jargon
launch_strategy: Day 1: 2 hero cinematic ads. Week 1+: Phase 1 UGC. Week 2+: Phases 2-3. Phase 4 when tickets live.

approved_ads_priority.name: Would You Walk Inside
approved_ads_priority.vo: Would you walk inside? Behind that glow — something the world has never seen. You gear up. You walk in. And BOOM — AI hologram boxers, live, front row. Real crowd. Real energy. Become a Founding Fan. The future is waiting.

Meta Ads Manager — adsmanager.facebook.com — payment method added
TikTok Ads Manager — ads.tiktok.com — Business Center + payment
Bio link on IG + TikTok → landing.html
Upload videos from Desktop paths above
compliance: Spectators watch — attendees do NOT fight in the ring
On-site POV tickets: Me vs Me (MVM) crypto only
Prize pool subject to event rules
